main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'inadequate phosphonate dosage 1.2 ppm + high-scaling feed + CaCO3 y/o CaPO4 etapa 2' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Revertir poliacrílico anterior 3 ppm + reducir recovery 78→65% + aumentar fosfonato 3 ppm pending test — match gold (revertir o aumentar).

requested_data.justification: Pide LSI y S&DSI en concentrate — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: LSI <0.5 y S&DSI negativo → descartar CaCO3.
